title: jasione montana subvar. humilis
intro: Jasione montana subvar. humilis, also known as low-growing cat's ear, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the bellflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for wound healing and skin issues. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparation of Jasione montana subvar. humilis typically involves drying and infusing the leaves and flowers to create a tea or tincture that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
